title: "O How Love I Thy Law" Psalm 119:97

notes.introduction: Preaching from Psalm 119:97 and ranging across multiple passages, the pastor develops the theme of the believer's relationship to the Bible under the heading 'O How Love I Thy Law,' examining what it means to love, learn, and live the Scriptures.
outline: I. As a follower of Jesus, I should love the Scriptures: surveying Psalm 119 verses 97, 140, 159, 163, 165, and 167 on the psalmist's expressed love for God's Word
II. As a follower of Jesus, I should learn the Scriptures: three means identified as personal devotions, church attendance under biblical preaching, and discipleship
III. As a follower of Jesus, I should live the Scriptures: obedience to the Word as the purpose of learning it, drawn from Joshua 1:8, Psalm 19:11, and Psalm 86:11
themes: pastoral responsibility to feed the flock
